visa_type_detail.name: EU/EFTA nationals
visa_type_detail.description: EU/EFTA nationals have easier access to the Swiss employment market, thanks to the Agreement on the Free Movement of Persons

visa_type_detail.name: non-EU/EFTA States
visa_type_detail.description: Only a limited number of workers are admitted from non-EU/EFTA States, primarily management level employees, specialists and other qualified employees.

essential_apps.description: Digital identity for accessing online services from government and private sector.

Public transport planner, timetable, and ticketing for Swiss Federal Railways.
Mobile payment app for instant payments at the point of sale and online.
Digital banking app for everyday banking needs.
